differences.reason: Hamstergres Proxy intentionally rejects user-defined functions and procedures before they can create unknown fleet-wide side effects.
Hamstergres Proxy intentionally rejects server-local CREATE DATABASE before backend privilege checks because it cannot guarantee fleet-atomic execution.
Server-local database DDL and ALTER DATABASE SET TABLESPACE cannot be executed failure-atomically across Burrows and are intentionally rejected.
